ComponentType: N-Channel Enhancement Mode Small Signal MOSFET
Description: This is a 60V, 115 mA N-channel MOSFET designed for low-power switching and amplification applications. It features a low threshold voltage and is housed in a SOT-23 package, making it suitable for space-constrained designs in automotive and general-purpose circuits.

KeyParameters.Drain-Source On-State Resistance (RDS(on: 7.5 Ω max @ VGS = 10 V, ID = 500 mA

Functions.FunctionDescription: Controls the conduction between drain and source.
The terminal where current exits the channel. Connects to the load.
The terminal where current enters the channel. Typically connected to ground or the lower supply rail.
